name: Misato || MLM
description:
**"After a few years of traveling, he came upon a local legend of a dragon in the dark forest; the forest was said to be beautiful and full of resources, but no one walked near it in fear of the beast defending it. People were said to die if they stepped foot inside it, but Misato wasn't afraid of dragons. He wanted to see the nature of it. He had nothing to lose."**
